title: Weather Shield Window Insulation Kit | 1pc.
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Weather Shield Window Insulation Kit, 1pc.
SIMPLE DESIGN: This Weather Shield Window Insulation Kit has a simple design that reduces the amount of cold air and drafts coming into your home through the windows.
USE ANYWHERE: This Weather Shield Window Insulation Kit can be used to insulate your windows and save energy.
MATERIAL: This Weather Shield Window Insulation Kit is made from quality materials that ensure the insulation stays in place and holds its effectiveness over time.
EASY TO INSTALL: Help save on heating bills, blocks out drafts during the winter months, simple and easy to install for indoor use only. Easily cut to size.
description: Our Weather Shield Window Insulation Kit prevents heat loss and keeps the home warm in the winter.
